summary: Yoo Yeonha directly accuses Hajin of being the Djinn, doubting his portal-based alibi due to its potential for tampering. Hajin fiercely defends himself, referencing a past incident where he and Chae Nayun collaborated to defeat a Djinn, and the verbal confrontation quickly escalates into a physical fight among the characters. As others intervene to calm the escalating tension, Hajin experiences an internal monologue, reflecting on his despair of being trapped within his own created novel and longing for his original world. The chapter concludes with Yoon Hyeon requesting to meet with Yeonha, hinting at further discussion or developments.
key_moments: Yoo Yeonha accuses Hajin of being the Djinn, questioning the validity of his portal-based alibi.
Hajin defends himself, citing his past collaboration with Chae Nayun in defeating a Djinn as proof of his innocence.
A heated argument escalates into a physical fight between the characters, which is eventually broken up by others.
Hajin has an internal monologue, expressing his distress about being trapped in his novel and missing his home world.
Yoon Hyeon requests a private meeting with Yoo Yeonha before their upcoming club meeting.
